title: Doctor Repair Upgrade
objective: Clone a disposable old-version-shaped OpenClaw env, apply a legacy config fixture from a known breaking-change boundary, upgrade to the target runtime, run Doctor repair, and verify the repaired env keeps status, plugin, provider, and gateway health usable.

phases.title: Clone Existing Env
phases.intent: Clone a durable existing env into a disposable Kova env before applying legacy config or upgrade actions.

phases.title: Upgrade To Target
phases.intent: Run the real target upgrade path through OCM after the legacy config state has been applied.

phases.title: Doctor Repair
phases.intent: Run Doctor repair and then run non-interactive Doctor again to prove repairable config validation errors are gone.
evidence: no repairable config validation errors after fix

phases.title: Post-Repair Health
phases.intent: Verify the repaired env still supports core status, plugin discovery, model discovery, service health, and clean gateway logs.
evidence: gateway logs without config validation loops, missing dependencies, or plugin load failures

snapshots.label: Legacy config state after fixture setup
snapshots.summary: Captures the old config profile and Kova evidence marker before target upgrade.

snapshots.label: Post-Doctor config state
snapshots.summary: Captures the repaired config state after doctor --fix and doctor --non-interactive.
